tagline: HVAC done right. Family-run, transparent, on time.
services_intro: Family-owned heating and cooling. Repairs, installations, and maintenance — straight-shooter quotes, no upsells.
service_1_desc: Diagnostics, refrigerant, compressor, full system replacement. Same-day for most repairs.
service_2_desc: Furnace, heat pump, and boiler service. Tune-ups, repairs, and full installs.
service_3_desc: Twice-a-year tune-ups. Catch issues early, extend equipment life, lower bills.
review_1_quote: Smith came out the same day my AC died in July. Honest quote, no upsell, fixed in two hours.
review_2_quote: We've used Smith for ten years. Three houses, three new systems. They've always been fair.
review_3_quote: Best HVAC in the area. They show up on time and clean up after themselves.
about_paragraph: Smith Heating & Air is a family-run HVAC company built on three rules: show up when you say, quote the work honestly, and stand behind everything you do. No gimmicks, no upsells, no surprises on the invoice.
